summary: NNDSS provisional notifiable disease surveillance table covering yellow fever and Zika virus disease (non-congenital) cases reported weekly and cumulatively by U.S. state/territory for 2020. Columns include current week counts, 52-week maximums, and cumulative totals.

NNDSS tuberculosis surveillance table reporting quarterly case counts by U.S. state/territory and region for 2018. Columns include current quarter cases, prior 4-quarter min/max, and cumulative annual totals.

NNDSS Table II surveillance data for Chlamydia trachomatis infection and Coccidioidomycosis reported weekly and cumulatively by U.S. state for 2018. Columns include current week counts, 52-week medians/maximums, and prior-year cumulative totals.

NNDSS Table II surveillance data for acute Hepatitis C (probable and confirmed) reported weekly and cumulatively by U.S. state/territory for 2018. Columns include current week counts, 52-week medians/maximums, and cumulative totals for 2017 and 2018.

CDC NCEH/DEHSP survey of restaurant grading programs across U.S. health jurisdictions. Columns include number of complaints, Salmonella/E. coli incidents, population served, inspection type, disclosure method, and agency type.

NNDSS provisional notifiable disease surveillance table covering dengue virus infections (dengue, dengue-like illness, severe dengue) reported weekly and cumulatively by U.S. state/territory for 2021. Columns include current week counts, 52-week maximums, and cumulative totals.

NNDSS provisional notifiable disease surveillance table for gonorrhea and Haemophilus influenzae invasive disease (all ages/serotypes and age <5 Serotype b) reported weekly and cumulatively by U.S. state/territory for 2020. Columns include current week counts, 52-week maximums, and cumulative totals.

NNDSS provisional notifiable disease surveillance table covering animal and human rabies cases reported weekly and cumulatively by U.S. state/territory for 2021. Columns include current week counts, 52-week maximums, and cumulative totals for 2020 and 2021.

500 Cities project city-level health data (2017 release) covering 2014-2015 estimates for 500 large U.S. cities. Columns include age-adjusted and crude prevalence rates for COPD, smoking, preventive care utilization, and other chronic disease indicators at census-tract level.

NNDSS provisional notifiable disease surveillance table covering congenital syphilis and primary/secondary syphilis cases reported weekly and cumulatively by U.S. state/territory for 2020. Columns include current week counts, 52-week maximums, and cumulative totals for 2019 and 2020.

NNDSS Table II surveillance data for Salmonellosis (excluding typhoid/paratyphoid fever), Shiga toxin-producing E. coli, and related enteric diseases reported weekly and cumulatively by U.S. state for 2018. Columns include current week counts, 52-week medians/maximums, and cumulative totals.

NNDSS provisional notifiable disease surveillance table covering viral hemorrhagic fevers (Crimean-Congo, Guanarito, Ebola viruses) reported weekly and cumulatively by U.S. state/territory for 2020. Columns include current week counts, 52-week maximums, and cumulative totals.

NNDSS provisional notifiable disease surveillance table covering malaria and measles (indigenous and imported) cases reported weekly and cumulatively by U.S. state/territory for 2022. Columns include current week counts, 52-week maximums, and cumulative totals for 2021 and 2022.

NNDSS provisional notifiable disease surveillance table covering viral hemorrhagic fevers (Machupo, Marburg, Sabia viruses) reported weekly and cumulatively by U.S. state/territory for 2021. Columns include current week counts, 52-week maximums, and cumulative totals for 2020 and 2021.

NNDSS Table II surveillance data for Babesiosis and Campylobacteriosis reported weekly and cumulatively by U.S. state for 2018. Columns include current week counts, 52-week medians/maximums, and cumulative totals for 2017 and 2018.

NNDSS Table II surveillance data for Legionellosis and Malaria reported weekly and cumulatively by U.S. state for 2018. Columns include current week counts, 52-week medians/maximums, and cumulative totals for 2017 and 2018.
